sections.heading: Scope of application (Article 2)
paragraphs: For the purposes of this Law, a partnership enterprise means a general partnership enterprise or a limited partnership enterprise established in China by natural persons, legal persons, and other organizations in accordance with this Law.

sections.heading: Derivative protection for limited partners (excerpt)
paragraphs: The law allows a limited partner whose interests in the limited partnership are harmed to assert rights against the responsible partner or bring suit in accordance with the statute and the partnership agreement.

sections.heading: Debt payment and bankruptcy (Article 92 excerpt)
paragraphs: Where a partnership enterprise is unable to pay debts as they fall due, a creditor may apply to the people's court for bankruptcy liquidation, or may require the general partners to make payment.
